form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 300m in 17.50 last start, beating Majestic Socks. Likes the rails so makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 300m (17.70) beating Piqued Interest in Grade 4 on April 6. Can keep things rolling.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 300m (17.70) beating Piqued Interest in Grade 4 on April 6. Can keep things rolling.

form.formComment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 12 lengths behind Kingsbrae Ted over 300m. Should show more than the latest offering. Has claims.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished seventh at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 12 lengths behind Kingsbrae Ted over 300m. Should show more than the latest offering. Has claims.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Severely checked on the first turn.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.85) at this track in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing fifth and beaten 8 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from 10 starts. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.89) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 6 lengths. Box stats strong with two wins and two placings from five starts. Looks a place chance at best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (17.89) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 6 lengths. Box stats strong with two wins and two placings from five starts. Looks a place chance at best.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided on the first turn; Collided on the home turn.
Began quickly; Collided on the first turn.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 17.66 over 300m at this track. Has an outstanding 17.3 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when second (16.09) over 272m at The Gardens. Has to overcome a wide draw but can measure up.

form.formComment: Drawn the outside box and could be suited with some luck. Goes ok at this track and distance but recent form not good enough, prepared to risk.
